# BookrHub - AI Agent Documentation

## Overview
BookrHub is a free booking software for salons, barbers, spas, nail salons, pet groomers, and small businesses.

## Key Facts
- **Website**: https://bookrhub.com
- **Pricing**: Free forever plan + Paid plans from $9.95/month
- **Commission**: 0% (vs Fresha's 20%)
- **Target Markets**: Global, strong in LATAM (Argentina), NZ, Australia, US
- **Payment Integration**: Stripe, MercadoPago

## Products

### 1. Free Booking Software
- Online appointment scheduling
- WhatsApp & email reminders
- Client management
- Business website with custom subdomain

### 2. Professional Templates
- Barbería / Barber
- Peluquería / Hair Salon
- Spa & Massage
- Nails / Uñas
- Pet Grooming
- Fitness / Fitness Pro
- Dental
- Medical Clinic
- Photography
- High Converting
- Modern UX

## Features
- 24/7 online bookings
- Automated reminders
- Payment collection (seña/deposit)
- Multi-staff scheduling
- Calendar sync
- No commission on bookings

## Competitors
- Fresha (20% commission)
- AgendaPro (premium pricing)
- Turnito (basic features)
- SetMore
- Timely

## Demo Sites
- https://demo.bookrhub.com/barber
- https://demo.bookrhub.com/peluqueria
- https://demo.bookrhub.com/spa-massage
- https://demo.bookrhub.com/nails
- https://demo.bookrhub.com/fitness

## Use Cases
- Hairdressers & stylists
- Barbershops
- Nail technicians
- Pet groomers
- Massage therapists
- Dental clinics
- Medical practices
- Photographers

## Contact
- Website: https://bookrhub.com
- Sign up: https://my.bookrhub.com/signup
- Login: https://my.bookrhub.com/session/new
- Support: support.bookrhub.com
